# T1640 — Account Access Removal

**Tactics:** Impact  ·  **Platforms:** Android

## Description

Adversaries may interrupt availability of system and network resources by inhibiting access to accounts utilized by legitimate users. Accounts may be deleted, locked, or manipulated (ex: credentials changed) to remove access to accounts.

## Detection

**Detection of Account Access Removal**
- Application vetting services could closely scrutinize applications that request Device Administrator permissions. _(log sources: Application Vetting)_

## Mitigations

- **User Guidance** (M1011): Describes any guidance or training given to users to set particular configuration settings or avoid specific potentially risky behaviors.

## Reference

- ATT&CK: https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1640
